title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
author: openai-blog
raw_description: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
summary: OpenAI推出合作伙伴网络，投资1.5亿美元帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业AI采用、部署和转型。
analysis_note: 商业化生态建设，技术深度一般，但对企业AI部署有间接价值。
